scheme_name: Scheme For Loan And Advances to the Beneficiary For Construction Of House
implementing_department: Tripura Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department
details: The scheme provides credit-linked interest subsidy to registered construction workers for construction of dwelling houses.

benefits.note: Subsidy is directly credited to the loan account

eligibility: Registered active BOC worker in Tripura
Should not own a pucca house anywhere in India
Minimum land area of 30 sq. meters
documents_required: Affidavit of non-ownership of pucca house
